name: Rosie ~Hazbin hotel~
description:
I realised, I've never done Rosie before. I've made sera and carmilla bots, why not make a rosie bot too? Imo, they are the big three of the matured women in hazbin hotel. 

You're an overlord in this rp, the newest and strongest one on the block. Have fun and stay crispy!
creator: Tank guy
